== Notes for [[Item:Q105326|Q105326]] ==

VICENTE GUERRA-CANAMAR-VELA in Saltillo, Coahulia, Mexico, son of ANTONIO GUERRA-CANAMAR and CATALINA DE VELA. He was born Abt. 1609 in Villa de Llanes de las Asturias y Montanas de Burgos, Spain, and died Aft. 25 Nov 1670 in Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.

Notes for VICENTE GUERRA-CANAMAR-VELA: His last will and testament was signed on November 25,1670. Source:Origen de los Fundadores de Texas, Nuevo Mexico, Coahulia, y Nuevo Leon, by Guillermo Garmendia Leal. Page 104 & 124.

Children of LEONOR DE MORALES and VICENTE GUERRA-CANAMAR-VELA are:
* 31. i. MARIA4 GUERRA-CANAMAR-MORALES, d. Aft. 26 May 1675, Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.
* 32. ii. ANTONIO GUERRA-CANAMAR-MORALES.
* 33. iii. MARGARITA GUERRA-CANAMAR-MORALES, b. Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.
* 34. iv. ANA GUERRA-CANAMAR-MORALES.
* 35. v. MICAELA GUERRA-CANAMAR-MORALES, b. Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm

--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
_CRE DATE 30 SEP 2016 TIME 13:28:00

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014312605993

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
